channel.title: First Car on
channel.description: Recent content in First Car on

item.title: Best Car Loans for Students (2026): No Credit, Cosigners & Low Rates Explained
item.description: The best car loans for students are the ones that get you approved without trapping you in years of punishing interest. As a student you usually have limited or no credit history, irregular income, and a tight budget — exactly the profile lenders treat as high risk. The right strategy, a cosigner, and a credit-union pre-approval can land you an APR well under the double-digit rates no-credit borrowers are typically quoted.
